title: translations.yml
description: Every player-facing string, with its translations. Locale files are generated from this.

key.description: The string looked up in code as L["key"]. Also the English fallback when no enUS translation is given.

description.description: Optional guidance for translators. Not shown to players.

translations.description: A translated string per locale. A missing locale falls back to enUS, and enUS falls back to the key.

propertyNames.description: A WoW locale code such as enUS, deDE or zhCN.
